channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: Microsoft Exchange Online service change causes email access issues
item.description: Microsoft is working to address an ongoing service issue that has intermittently prevented some users from accessing their cloud-based Exchange Online mailboxes via Outlook mobile and Mac desktop clie...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Microsoft Warns IRS Phishing Hits 29,000 Users, Deploys RMM Malware
item.description: Microsoft has warned of fresh campaigns that are capitalizing on the upcoming tax season in the U.S. to harvest credentials and deliver malware. The email campaigns take advantage of the urgency and t...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: FBI warns of Handala hackers using Telegram in malware attacks
item.description: The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) warned network defenders that Iranian hackers linked to the country's Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS) are using Telegram in malware attacks....
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: CISA orders feds to patch DarkSword iOS flaws exploited attacks
item.description: CISA ordered U.S. government agencies to patch three iOS vulnerabilities targeted in cryptocurrency theft and cyberespionage attacks using the DarkSword exploit kit. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Trivy Hack Spreads Infostealer via Docker, Triggers Worm and Kubernetes Wiper
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have uncovered malicious artifacts distributed via Docker Hub following the Trivy supply chain attack, highlighting the widening blast radius across developer environments. T...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: New KB5085516 emergency update fixes Microsoft account sign-in
item.description: Microsoft has released an emergency update to address a major issue that breaks sign-ins with Microsoft accounts across multiple Microsoft apps, including Teams and OneDrive. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-32975 (CVSS 10.0) to Hijack Unpatched Quest KACE SMA Systems
item.description: Threat actors are suspected to be exploiting a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA), according to Arctic Wolf. The cybersecurity company said it obser...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: VoidStealer malware steals Chrome master key via debugger trick
item.description: An information stealer called VoidStealer uses a new approach to bypass Chrome's Application-Bound Encryption (ABE) and extract the master key for decrypting sensitive data stored in the browser. [......
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Trivy vulnerability scanner breach pushed infostealer via GitHub Actions
item.description: The Trivy vulnerability scanner was compromised in a supply-chain attack by threat actors known as TeamPCP, which distributed credential-stealing malware through official releases and GitHub Actions. ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Google adds ‘Advanced Flow’ for safe APK sideloading on Android
item.description: Google has announced a new mechanism in Android called Advanced Flow that will allow sideloading APKs from unverified developers for power users in a more secure way. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Microsoft Azure Monitor alerts abused for callback phishing attacks
item.description: Microsoft Azure Monitor alerts are being abused to send callback phishing emails that impersonate warnings from the Microsoft Security Team about unauthorized charges on your account. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: FBI Warns Russian Hackers Target Signal, WhatsApp in Mass Phishing Attacks
item.description: Threat actors affiliated with Russian Intelligence Services are conducting phishing campaigns to compromise commercial messaging applications (CMAs) like WhatsApp and Signal to seize control of accoun...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Oracle Patches Critical CVE-2026-21992 Enabling Unauthenticated RCE in Identity Manager
item.description: Oracle has released security updates to address a critical security flaw impacting Identity Manager and Web Services Manager that could be exploited to achieve remote code execution. The vulnerability...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Trivy Supply Chain Attack Triggers Self-Spreading CanisterWorm Across 47 npm Packages
item.description: The threat actors behind the supply chain attack targeting the popular Trivy scanner are suspected to be conducting follow-on attacks that have led to the compromise of a large number of npm packages ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: CISA Flags Apple, Craft CMS, Laravel Bugs in KEV, Orders Patching by April 3, 2026
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Friday added five security flaws impacting Apple, Craft CMS, and Laravel Livewire to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catal...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: FBI links Signal phishing attacks to Russian intelligence services
item.description: The FBI has issued a public service announcement warning that Russian intelligence-linked threat actors are actively targeting users of encrypted messaging apps such as Signal and WhatsApp in phishing...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Patch Now: Oracle's Fusion Middleware Has Critical RCE Flaw
item.description: Attackers can execute arbitrary code without authentication if Oracle's Identity or Web Services Managers are exposed to the Web....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Oracle pushes emergency fix for critical Identity Manager RCE flaw
item.description: Oracle has released an out-of-band security update to fix a critical unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in Identity Manager and Web Services Manager tracked as CVE-2026-21992. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Trivy Security Scanner GitHub Actions Breached, 75 Tags Hijacked to Steal CI/CD Secrets
item.description: Trivy, a popular open-source vulnerability scanner maintained by Aqua Security, was compromised a second time within the span of a month to deliver malware capable of stealing sensitive CI/CD secrets....
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Police take down 373,000 fake CSAM sites in Operation Alice
item.description: An international law enforcement action called Operation Alice has shut down over 373,000 dark web sites that offered fake CSAM packages. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Cyber OpSec Fail: Beast Gang Exposes Ransomware Server
item.description: Files on a central cloud server used by the ransomware group highlight a systematic, aggressive attack on network backups as a key TTP....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Critical Langflow Flaw CVE-2026-33017 Triggers Attacks within 20 Hours of Disclosure
item.description: A critical security flaw impacting Langflow has come under active exploitation within 20 hours of public disclosure, highlighting the speed at which threat actors weaponize newly published vulnerabili...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: CISA orders feds to patch max-severity Cisco flaw by Sunday
item.description: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to patch a maximum-severity vulnerability, CVE-2026-20131, in Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) by ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: How CISOs Can Survive the Era of Geopolitical Cyberattacks
item.description: Geopolitical tensions are driving destructive cyberattacks designed to disrupt operations, not demand ransom. CISOs must limit lateral movement and contain breaches to reduce the impact of wiper campa...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Interlock Ransomware Targets Cisco Enterprise Firewalls
item.description: The ransomware gang, known for double-extortion attacks, had access to a critical Cisco firewall vulnerability weeks before it was publicly disclosed....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Google Adds 24-Hour Wait for Unverified App Sideloading to Reduce Malware and Scams
item.description: Google on Thursday announced a new "advanced flow" for Android sideloading that requires a mandatory 24-hour wait period to install apps from unverified developers in an attempt to balance openness wi...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: The Importance of Behavioral Analytics in AI-Enabled Cyber Attacks
item.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is changing how individuals and organizations conduct many activities, including how cybercriminals carry out phishing attacks and iterate on malware. Now, cybercriminals ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Musician admits to $10M streaming royalty fraud using AI bots
item.description: North Carolina musician Michael Smith has pleaded guilty to collecting over $10 million in royalty payments through a massive streaming royalty fraud scheme on Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, and ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Magento PolyShell Flaw Enables Unauthenticated Uploads, RCE and Account Takeover
item.description: Sansec is warning of a critical security flaw in Magento's REST API that could allow unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary executables and achieve code execution and account takeover. The vuln...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: International joint action disrupts world’s largest DDoS botnets
item.description: Authorities from the United States, Germany, and Canada have taken down Command and Control (C2) infrastructure used by the Aisuru, KimWolf, JackSkid, and Mossad botnets to infect Internet of Things (...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer
